ext-quicksurveys-pref-displayquicksurvey: Astaantani waxay soo bandhigi doontaa [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:QuickSurveys sahanno gaagaaban oo ikhtiyaari ah] oo ay bixiso Wikimedia Foundation, kuwaas oo aan ku xirnayn akoonkaaga.
quicksurveys-desc: Waxay soo bandhigtaa sahannada la habeeyay
ext-quicksurveys-example-internal-survey: Kani waa sharaxaadda sahanka gudaha ee tusaalaha ah
ext-quicksurveys-example-external-survey: Waxaan u baahanahay caawimadaada si aan u horumarino {{SITENAME}}.
Markaad ka jawaabto sahankan waxaad naga caawin doontaa inaan fahanno sida aan uga dhigi karno {{SITENAME}} mid ka wanaagsan oo kuu anfac badan. Mahadsanid!
Sahan uu bixiyay ExampleSurveyProvider. Eeg [//example.org/privacy-policy siyaasadda asturnaanta]
ext-quicksurveys-survey-privacy-policy-d: Dhammaan soo gudbinta waa qarsoodi. Eeg [//example.org/privacy-policy siyaasadda asturnaanta].
ext-quicksurveys-survey-change-preferenc: Si aad uga joojiso QuickSurveys inay soo muuqdaan, [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-personal-quicksurveyext|beddel dookhyadaada]].
ext-quicksurveys-survey-confirm-msg: Waad ku mahadsan tahay jawaab celinta! Waxaan u adeegsanaynaa si aan {{SITENAME}} uga dhigno mid ka sii wanaagsan!
ext-quicksurveys-internal-freeform-surve: Fadlan dooro jawaab ama geli jawaabtaada.
